title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: February 27, 2025
summary: February 27, 2025: The Arctic sea ice has experienced a very small decrease for this week at a rate of 0.64% (as opposed to last week’s increase rate of 1.66%), from the level on 02/20/2025 of 13.904 M km 2 to 13.815 M km 2 for this week. title: Alaska SBDC and the SBA: A Powerful Partnership for Small Business Success
summary: For small business owners and entrepreneurs in Alaska, navigating the complexities of starting, growing, and sustaining a business can be challenging. The Alaska Small Business Development Center (SBDC), in partnership with the U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA), provides essential support to help businesses overcome these challenges and thrive. title: AFN Board Meets in Juneau
summary: On February 11, the AFN Board of Directors convened in Juneau for their winter meeting that brought together members to discuss key issues facing Alaska Natives.
